title: End Connected To Overworld
description: Link Overworld to The End dimension with additional The End Gateway tweaks and special support for Happy Ghast from Vanilla Backport mod.
body:
# End Connected To Overworld

Link Overworld to The End dimension with additional The End Gateway tweaks and special support for Happy Ghast from Vanilla Backport mod.

## Features

*   Overworld <-> The End dimension stacking.
*   Flying up from Overworld to go to The End Dimension.
*   Jumping down from The End void to go to Overworld.
*   Happy Ghast from Vanilla Backport dimension stacking special support.
*   Happy Ghast will not take void damage on the below world.
*   Fix End Gateway ridden entities teleportation.
*   Stop End Gateway from recreating destination End Gateway.
*   Fully configurable.

## Compatibility

*   [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/project/6xwxDTgf)
*   [Passengers Portal Fix](https://modrinth.com/project/LI0BrUQA)

## Issues

There are no new compatibility issues or bugs being reported. Please report it on [GitHub](https://github.com/mahmudindev/mcmod-commission-endconnectedtooverworld/issues) so it can be fixed.

## Support

🟪 26.1-26.1.2 / 🟪 1.21.1 / 🟩 1.20.1 / 🟪 1.16.5

🟩 Supported  
🟥 Support Dropped  
🟨 In Progress  
🟪 Considered

## Note

It's MIT open source. Feel free to use in modpacks, videos, stream, or similar media.
